title: Good Things To Have In Battles
description: Good Things To Have In Battles - Adds Medkits, bandges and more!
body:
This mod adds heals and military armors to the game.

**Heals**:
- Bandages - Heals you
- Medkits  - Heals you more

**Military armors**:
- Iron militaty armor (green, black)

---

To use heals just hold right click!



<details>
<summary>Crafting recipes</summary>
  
**Bandage**: String and leather (SL)
  
**Medkit**: Bandage, Iron Ingot, Bandage (S)

**Iron M. Armor**: Leather Armor and Iron Armor (SL)

To change variants of armor just put it inside crafting grid.


**SL**-Shapeless,\
**S**-Shaped
</details>
